step_rationale: Post-MI T cell pro-inflammatory mediator; T cell-driven plaque inflammation.
mechanism: CREM regulates T cell inflammatory responses post-MI, contributing to plaque destabilization and inflammation.

references.title: Uncovering Hippo pathway-related biomarkers in acute myocardial infarction via scRNA-seq binding transcriptomics.

Persistent transcriptional changes in cardiac adaptive immune cells following myocardial infarction: New evidence from the re-analysis of publicly available single cell and nuclei RNA-sequencing data sets.
references.journal: Journal of molecular and cellular cardiology
